news.title: AI talent war: Software industry is a new target as top executives jump ship to OpenAI
news.summary: Software giants are seeing their worst stock performance in years on fears of AI disruption. Now they have a new problem. They have to find a way to make sure their software can compete with the new technology.

news.title: Iran says no meeting with U.S. negotiators planned in Pakistan, with Trump envoys due to head to Islamabad
news.summary: U.S. special envoy Steve Witkoff and Jared Kushner are expected to arrive in Islamabad on Saturday. They are due to meet with Pakistani Prime Minister Nawaz Sharif.

news.title: Berkshire attracts interest as it slips further behind the S&P 500
news.summary: As Berkshire Hathaway shares fall, the stock is drawing attention from some investors. The company's stock is down about 2% this year. The stock is also down about 1% in 2014.

news.title: For car, phone, even tractor owners, a populist wave is rising to end the 'captive' repair economy
news.summary: "Right to repair" legislation is an issue that political candidates across the U.S. have made part of their affordability messaging. "Right to Repair" legislation has become an issue for political candidates.

news.title: Pirro could reopen Fed probe at any time, Democratic senators warn
news.summary: Sens. Elizabeth Warren and Dick Durbin question Jeanine Pirro's mention of reopening a probe of Fed Chair Jerome Powell.

news.title: As mass layoffs threaten jobs, here are 4 smart moves to protect yourself
news.summary: Do this now, even if you have a job. Do this now. Even if you don't. Do it now. Do not wait until you have to go to work.

news.title: ‘We are not close’: My brother says our mother left no estate when she died. How on earth can I trust him?
news.summary: “He had a medical power of attorney since my mom was in a nursing home,” her daughter said. “He was a very, very good man.”

news.title: Looking to get an EV for the first time? How to avoid making a huge financial mistake.
news.summary: $4 gas got you looking at EVs? You’re not alone. Here’s what to think about first. $4 gas made you look atEVs? You're not Alone. Here's what to Think about First.

news.title: Apple, Best Buy and Lululemon’s new CEOs signal a generational shift, as companies navigate a more chaotic world
news.summary: The companies have tapped executives with backgrounds that focus on digital transformation. In naming new CEOs, the companies are tapping executives who have backgrounds in digital transformation, too.

news.title: How Intel’s CEO brought the storied company back from the brink
news.summary: Two years ago, Intel’s survival was an “existential question.” Now, the company is seeing new life.
